name: Jeff Van Drew
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $429,267 for Jeff Van Drew in U.S. House, NJ-02. Public statements and congressional records indicate this candidate has taken a stance aligned with Israel-focused security policy framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
